qldb.stream.kinesisconfiguration.CfnAbou: The configuration settings of the Amazon Kinesis Data Streams destination for an Amazon QLDB journal stream.

qldb.stream.kinesisconfiguration.Aggrega.Description: Enables QLDB to publish multiple data records in a single Kinesis Data Streams record, increasing the number of records sent per API call.   *This option is enabled by default.* Record aggregation has important implications for processing records and requires de-aggregation in your stream consumer. To learn more, see [KPL Key Concepts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/streams/latest/dev/kinesis-kpl-concepts.html) and [Consumer De-aggregation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/streams/latest/dev/kinesis-kpl-consumer-deaggregation.html) in the *Amazon Kinesis Data Streams Developer Guide*.

qldb.stream.kinesisconfiguration.StreamA.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Kinesis Data Streams resource.
